0.text: Mosaic density differences in both lung parenchyma

1.text: Calcific nodules in both lung parenchyma

2.text: Increases in peribronchial reticulonodular density in both lungs

3.text: Slight decrease in size of existing nodules in posterior upper lobe of right lung

4.text: Slight decrease in size of existing nodules in posterior lower lobe of left lung

5.text: Unification and increase in size of irregularly circumscribed reticulonodular densities in superior lingular segment of left lung

6.text: Minimal decrease in existing densities in some areas
